paper_title: PolyMath: Evaluating Mathematical Reasoning in Multilingual Contexts
evaluation_method: Multilingual mathematical reasoning benchmark from Qwen, covering 18 languages and 4 difficulty levels (low, medium, high, top) with 9,000 high-quality problem samples. Models generate solutions to math problems. At each difficulty level, accuracy (ACC) is computed for every model-language pair using pass@1 metric. The overall PolyMath benchmark score uses Difficulty-Weighted Accuracy (DW-ACC) which weights accuracy across the four difficulty levels. Evaluation checks if the model's final answer matches the ground truth after normalization. All 65+ variants correspond to language/difficulty combinations (e.g., polymath_en_high, polymath_zh_top).
